arts.ttl: Thomas Frank sends warning to Arsenal ahead of north London derby in Hong Kong - as he provides update on Son Heung-Min's future
arts.sum: NICK CALLOW: The match will be played in front of 50,000 fans at the Kai Tak Sports Park, adding an extra level of occasion to what is already a high-pressure fixture.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano says £70m Arsenal target definitely isn’t signing for Tottenham
arts.sum: It’s one thing for Arsenal to miss out on a transfer target, but it’s quite another to miss out on a target to Tottenham Hotspur....
